444.summary: Az itthon is aktív Szent X. Piusz Papi Testvériség négy püspököt tervez felszentelni, aminek a vége biztosan a kizárásuk lesz az egyházból. Az antiszemita botrányokkal is kísért fundamentalista csoport viszonya évtizedek óta feszült a Vatikánnal, voltak is már kizárva, de ez sem tántorítja el őket.

Szivárványos zászlók között játsszák az Irán–Egyiptom mérkőzést
444.summary: Irán szövetségi kapitánya, Amir Ghalenoei azt mondta, hogy nem kíván olyan „dolgokról beszélni, amelyek nem léteznek”.

HVG.title: A Népszava tulajdonosi hálójában ott van a TV2 valódi tulajdonosát rejtő vagyonkezelő
HVG.summary: Új befektető érkezéséről beszélt a HVG-nek a Népszava főszerkesztője, miközben a lapot kiadó társaság mögötti tulajdonosi és szerződéses viszonyok alapján azt sem lehet teljes bizonyossággal megállapítani, kik a végső gazdasági jogosultak. A Magyarország leggazdagabb üzletemberei közé tartozó, a Horn-kormány idején baloldali nagyvállalkozóként ismertté vált, majd a NER-ben is prosperáló Leisztinger Tamás hallgat, pedig egy titokzatos vételi opció egészen új irányt adhat az eseményeknek.

BBC.title: Even if you're fit and young, avoid runs and too many beers in the heat, experts say
BBC.summary: Cardiac arrests have gone up during very hot weather, and it's not just among the elderly and frail, experts are warning.

BBC.summary: Temperatures in Germany could hit 40C in some areas while French officials bring in alcohol restrictions to ease pressure on hospitals.

TechCrunch.title: Xprize founder says ‘humans behave better when they’re being watched’
TechCrunch.summary: Peter Diamandis is the latest tech executive to argue that global surveillance will make the world a better place, following Larry Ellison's comments in 2024.

TechCrunch.title: Robotaxis drive miles just to get cleaned and charged; this new startup wants to fix that
TechCrunch.summary: Aseon Labs, which came out of Y Combinator's 2026 spring cohort, has raised $10 million from Crane Venture Partners and others.

TechCrunch.title: Early Bird pricing ends tonight for TechCrunch Founder Summit
TechCrunch.summary: Save up to $190 on your pass to TechCrunch Founder Summit 2026. Early Bird pricing ends today, at 11:59 p.m. PT, after which rates increase. Register now.

TechCrunch.title: The White House is asking OpenAI to slow roll the release of its new model over safety concerns
TechCrunch.summary: OpenAI reportedly plans to share its newest model, GPT 5.6, with a select group of partners instead of with the broader public. The reason: the Trump administration told it to.

TechCrunch.title: YouTube Shorts are getting even shorter with an update that lets you double the playback speed
TechCrunch.summary: YouTube Shorts is getting a makeover.

TechCrunch.summary: Agent-testing startup Patronus AI, founded by former Meta AI researchers, is experiencing nearly insatiable demand, its investor says.

TechCrunch.title: Polymarket says hackers stole users’ funds
TechCrunch.summary: The prediction market giant Polymarket said it's refunding users who had funds stolen due to a third-party breach.

TechCrunch.title: Xbox follows Apple with price increases
TechCrunch.summary: The company says the increases are being driven by rising memory and console storage prices, with costs more than 2.5x higher than previous levels.

TechCrunch.title: Notion Mail shuts down amid agent takeover
TechCrunch.summary: The company said it is discontinuing its email inbox in favor of its AI agent offering as users are increasingly handing over the reins of their email to the agents.

TechCrunch.summary: Base Power is skipping the PJM's troubled interconnection queue by placing its batteries at people's homes, offering backup services in exchange.

TechCrunch.title: Anthropic’s Claude is winning over paid consumers, a market owned by ChatGPT
TechCrunch.summary: Despite ChatGPT's commanding market lead, consumers who pay for AI have been increasingly choosing Anthropic's Claude, data shows.

TechCrunch.title: General Intuition’s $2.3B bet that video games can train AI agents for the real world

TechCrunch.title: Hacked Klue says criminals are deleting stolen customer data, but now other hackers are making threats
TechCrunch.summary: Market research company Klue told customers that it believes the hacking group that stole their data is now deleting it. The company, however, warned about a second group of hackers wanting ransom.

TechCrunch.title: Rippling now wants to be your entire data stack
TechCrunch.summary: "There were employees doing things like, 'Claude is so helpful for me — it analyzes my calendar and my email and puts together a plan for me,'" he says. "That person was spending at a run rate of $30,000 a year for this."
